クラス Columbina

java.lang.Object
model.entity.Character
model.character.Columbina
すべての実装されたインタフェース:
CharacterTeamBuffProvider, ReactionAwareCharacter, CombatSimulator.ReactionListener
public class Columbina extends Character implements CharacterTeamBuffProvider, ReactionAwareCharacter
Custom "Lunar" Hydro character implementation.

Mechanics overview:

  • Gravity / Gravity Ripple (Skill) — summons a periodic Hydro field that ticks every 2 s for 25 s and generates particles.
  • Moonlit Melancholy (Burst) — HP-scaling Hydro nuke; activates a 20 s Lunar Domain that adds LUNAR_REACTION_DMG_BONUS_ALL.
  • Gravity accumulation — Lunar reactions (Charged, Bloom, Crystallize) near an active ripple accumulate Gravity in increments of 20 (max 60); at cap the dominant reaction type triggers an Interference attack.
  • Verdant / Moonridge Dew — Bloom reactions grant Verdant Dew stacks; Bloom inside an active Lunar Domain grants Moonridge Dew stacks (up to 3 per 18 s window). Consuming a Dew on a Charged Attack fires a special Moondew Cleanse hit sequence.
  • Lunar Multiplier passive — grants LUNAR_MULTIPLIER to the whole party as a function of Columbina's total HP (capped at +7%).
  • 4th passive — Lunar Domain synergies: Lunar-Charged: Thundercloud strikes have a 33% chance for an extra strike; Lunar-Bloom: Moonridge Dew gain rate increased to up to 3 per 18 s; Lunar-Crystallize (Moondrift Harmony): each Moondrift has a 33% chance for an extra attack.

Constellation 1 — Radiance Over Blossoms and Peaks:

  • Skill (Eternal Tides) immediately triggers Gravity Interference (15 s CD).
  • Moonsign Ascendant Gleam: on each Interference trigger, applies a bonus based on the dominant Gravity type — Lunar-Charged: active character +6 Energy; Lunar-Bloom: 8 s interruption resistance; Lunar-Crystallize: 8 s Rainsea Shield (12% Columbina Max HP, Hydro ×250%).
  • All party members' Lunar Reaction DMG permanently +1.5%.

Constellation 2 — Tides of Lunar Gravity:

  • Rate of accumulating Gravity increases by 34% (cooldown reduced from 2 s to ~1.49 s).
  • On Gravity Interference, Columbina gains Lunar Brilliance (+40% Max HP) for 8 s.
  • Moonsign Ascendant Gleam: while Lunar Brilliance is already active at the next Interference trigger, the dominant reaction type grants the active character a stat bonus for 8 s scaled from Columbina's Max HP — Lunar-Charged: ATK +1% HP; Lunar-Bloom: EM +0.35% HP; Lunar-Crystallize: DEF +1% HP.
  • All nearby party members' Lunar Reaction DMG permanently +7%.

Columbina is a Lunar character (isLunarCharacter() returns true) and registers herself as a CombatSimulator.ReactionListener on first action.

  • メソッドの概要

    修飾子とタイプ
    メソッド
    説明
    private void
    accumulateGravity(AttackAction.LunarReactionType type, CombatSimulator sim)
    Increments the Gravity counter by 20 for the given reaction type and triggers an Interference attack when the counter reaches MAX_GRAVITY.
    private void
    applyC1MoonsignEffect(AttackAction.LunarReactionType dominant, CombatSimulator sim)
    Applies the C1 Moonsign: Ascendant Gleam bonus triggered on Gravity Interference.
    private void
    applyC2MoonsignEffect(AttackAction.LunarReactionType dominant, CombatSimulator sim)
    Applies the C2 Moonsign: Ascendant Gleam bonus triggered when Lunar Brilliance is already active at the time of a subsequent Gravity Interference.
    void
    applyPassive(StatsContainer stats)
    No static passive stat modifications for Columbina (handled dynamically).
    private AttackAction.LunarReactionType
    getDominantReactionType()
    Returns the Lunar reaction type that has accumulated the most Gravity, or "Lunar-Charged" as the default when no Gravity has accumulated.
    double
    getEnergyCost()
    Returns the burst energy cost (60).
    private double
    getMultiplier(String key)
    Retrieves a talent multiplier value from the CSV data manager.
    List<Buff>
    getTeamBuffs()
    Returns the permanent team buffs provided by Columbina.
    boolean
    isLunarCharacter()
    Returns true; Columbina is a Lunar character and benefits from Lunar synergy buffs and the LUNAR_MULTIPLIER final multiplier.

    onAction(CharacterActionRequest request, CombatSimulator sim)
    Handles typed action requests dispatched by the combat simulator.
    void
    onReaction(ReactionResult result, Character source, double time, CombatSimulator sim)
    Handles reaction events to accumulate Gravity and Dew stacks.
    private void
    performSpecialCA(CombatSimulator sim, boolean moonridge)
    Fires three Moondew Cleanse hits (Dendro, HP-scaling) as part of an enhanced Charged Attack when a Dew stack is available.

    toLunarReactionType(ReactionResult result)
     
    private void
    triggerInterference(AttackAction.LunarReactionType dominant, CombatSimulator sim)
    Fires an Interference attack corresponding to the dominant reaction type.

  • コンストラクタの詳細

    • Columbina

      public Columbina(Weapon weapon, ArtifactSet artifacts)
      Constructs Columbina with the given weapon and artifact set. Initialises level-90 base stats, Hydro element, and cooldowns.
      パラメータ:
      weapon - equipped weapon
      artifacts - equipped artifact set

    • Columbina

      public Columbina(Weapon weapon, ArtifactSet artifacts, TalentDataSource talentData)

  • メソッドの詳細

    • isLunarCharacter

      public boolean isLunarCharacter()
      Returns true; Columbina is a Lunar character and benefits from Lunar synergy buffs and the LUNAR_MULTIPLIER final multiplier.
      オーバーライド:
      isLunarCharacter クラス内 Character

    • getEnergyCost

      public double getEnergyCost()
      Returns the burst energy cost (60).
      定義:
      getEnergyCost クラス内 Character

    • applyPassive

      public void applyPassive(StatsContainer stats)
      No static passive stat modifications for Columbina (handled dynamically).
      定義:
      applyPassive クラス内 Character

    • getMultiplier

      private double getMultiplier(String key)
      Retrieves a talent multiplier value from the CSV data manager.
      パラメータ:
      key - talent key string (e.g. "Skill DMG")
      戻り値:
      the multiplier value, or 0.0 if not found

    • onAction

      public void onAction(CharacterActionRequest request, CombatSimulator sim)
      Handles typed action requests dispatched by the combat simulator. Registers the reaction listener on first use.

      Supported actions:

      • CharacterActionKey.CHARGE — performs a Moondew Cleanse if Dew is available, otherwise a standard Charged Attack.
      • CharacterActionKey.SKILL — casts Eternal Tides, starts the Gravity Ripple periodic event, and generates 4 Hydro particles.
      • CharacterActionKey.BURST — casts Moonlit Melancholy and applies the 20 s Lunar Domain reaction bonus team buff.
      • CharacterActionKey.NORMAL — fires Columbina's current normal attack.
      オーバーライド:
      onAction クラス内 Character
      パラメータ:
      request - typed action request
      sim - the combat simulator context

    • performSpecialCA

      private void performSpecialCA(CombatSimulator sim, boolean moonridge)
      Fires three Moondew Cleanse hits (Dendro, HP-scaling) as part of an enhanced Charged Attack when a Dew stack is available.
      パラメータ:
      sim - the combat simulator context
      moonridge - true if consuming a Moonridge Dew stack (unused branch distinction; both variants use the same attack pattern)

    • onReaction

      public void onReaction(ReactionResult result, Character source, double time, CombatSimulator sim)
      Handles reaction events to accumulate Gravity and Dew stacks.

      Only Lunar-type reactions (Lunar-Charged, Lunar-Bloom, Lunar-Crystallize) are processed. Gravity accumulates when a Ripple is active and the 2 s inter-gravity cooldown has elapsed. Moonridge Dew is granted for Bloom inside the active Lunar Domain (18 s CD). Verdant Dew is granted for any Bloom near the Ripple.

      定義:
      onReaction インタフェース内 CombatSimulator.ReactionListener
      パラメータ:
      result - the reaction result carrying the reaction type name
      source - the character that triggered the reaction
      time - the simulation time at which the reaction occurred
      sim - the combat simulator context

    • accumulateGravity

      private void accumulateGravity(AttackAction.LunarReactionType type, CombatSimulator sim)
      Increments the Gravity counter by 20 for the given reaction type and triggers an Interference attack when the counter reaches MAX_GRAVITY.
      パラメータ:
      type - the Lunar reaction type string (e.g. "Lunar-Bloom")
      sim - the combat simulator context

    • getDominantReactionType

      private AttackAction.LunarReactionType getDominantReactionType()
      Returns the Lunar reaction type that has accumulated the most Gravity, or "Lunar-Charged" as the default when no Gravity has accumulated.
      戻り値:
      dominant reaction type string

    • triggerInterference

      private void triggerInterference(AttackAction.LunarReactionType dominant, CombatSimulator sim)
      Fires an Interference attack corresponding to the dominant reaction type. Each Lunar reaction type produces a distinct element and hit count. When C1 is active and Moonsign is Ascendant Gleam, also applies a dominant-type-specific bonus effect.
      パラメータ:
      dominant - the dominant Lunar reaction type that triggered the cap
      sim - the combat simulator context

    • applyC1MoonsignEffect

      private void applyC1MoonsignEffect(AttackAction.LunarReactionType dominant, CombatSimulator sim)
      Applies the C1 Moonsign: Ascendant Gleam bonus triggered on Gravity Interference.
      • Lunar-Charged: active character recovers 6 Energy.
      • Lunar-Bloom: active character gains interruption resistance for 8 s.
      • Lunar-Crystallize: active character gains Rainsea Shield (12% Columbina Max HP, Hydro 250% effectiveness) for 8 s.
      パラメータ:
      dominant - the dominant reaction type determining which effect fires
      sim - the combat simulator context

    • applyC2MoonsignEffect

      private void applyC2MoonsignEffect(AttackAction.LunarReactionType dominant, CombatSimulator sim)
      Applies the C2 Moonsign: Ascendant Gleam bonus triggered when Lunar Brilliance is already active at the time of a subsequent Gravity Interference.

      Each effect lasts 8 s and scales from Columbina's Max HP at the time of trigger:

      • Lunar-Charged: active character ATK +1% Columbina Max HP.
      • Lunar-Bloom: active character EM +0.35% Columbina Max HP.
      • Lunar-Crystallize: active character DEF +1% Columbina Max HP.
      パラメータ:
      dominant - the dominant reaction type determining which effect fires
      sim - the combat simulator context

    • toLunarReactionType

      private AttackAction.LunarReactionType toLunarReactionType(ReactionResult result)

    • getTeamBuffs

      public List<Buff> getTeamBuffs()
      Returns the permanent team buffs provided by Columbina.

      Includes a passive LUNAR_BASE_BONUS buff whose value scales with Columbina's total HP: min(0.07, (HP / 1000) * 0.002).

      定義:
      getTeamBuffs インタフェース内 CharacterTeamBuffProvider
      戻り値:
      list containing the Lunar Base Bonus buff
